async function handler(input) {
  try {
    const { state, payload } = input;

    if (!state || typeof state.display !== 'string' || typeof state.expr !== 'string') {
      return { error: 'Invalid state shape' };
    }

    if (typeof payload !== 'string' || payload.length !== 1) {
      return { error: 'Payload must be a single character' };
    }

    const key = payload;
    const newExpr = state.expr + key;
    const newDisplay = newExpr;

    const newState = {
      display: newDisplay,
      expr: newExpr
    };

    return {
      data: {
        state: newState
      }
    };
  } catch (err) {
    return { error: err.message };
  }
}
